hotspots.title: History of the Site
hotspots.description: This temporary section introduces the history of the graveyard and explains why the site is important to Charlotte.
hotspots.imageAlt: Temporary image for the history section

hotspots.title: People Remembered
hotspots.description: This section will share information about people connected to the graveyard and the surrounding community.
hotspots.imageAlt: Temporary image for the people remembered section

hotspots.title: Preserving the Graveyard
hotspots.description: This section will explain preservation efforts and how visitors can learn more about the historic site.
hotspots.imageAlt: Temporary image for the preservation section

hotspots.title: Second Mural Section
hotspots.description: This temporary card proves that a different section of a long mural can display its own AR information.
hotspots.imageAlt: Temporary artwork used as the second image target

hotspots.title: Exploring Multiple Sections
hotspots.description: Visitors will be able to walk along the fence and discover different hotspots as their camera recognizes each mural section.
hotspots.imageAlt: Temporary artwork used as the second image target
